title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL AT BARANGAY POBLACION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PROSPERIDAD, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL GOVERNMENT-FUNDED SECONDARY SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PROSPERIDAD NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6512 / 97 OG No. 12, 13 Supp. (Mar. 19, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8898, August 22, 2000 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL AT BARANGAY POBLACION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PROSPERIDAD, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL GOVERNMENT-FUNDED SECONDARY SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PROSPERIDAD NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Poblacion Barangay High School in the Municipality of Prosperidad, Province of Agusan del Sur is hereby absorbed by the national government and converted into a regular secondary school under the full control and supervision of the national government through the Department of Education, Culture and Sports.

SEC. 2. This school shall be known officially as the Prosperidad National High School.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, August 22, 2000.

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 17, 1999

and June 8 , 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate
